meaning: adj.有意的,故意的,已经订婚的 n 已经订婚者
examples: It didn't turn out like I intended.
The article was intended to provoke discussion.
The book is intended for children.
Quitting shows you intended to make a profit and will help if prior losses are challenged.
The price of NYSE seats and Archipelago shares surged after the announcement of the intended merger.
